scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev:scheduler -w backend" "npm run dev -w worker" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w worker && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w worker
